title: Ocugen Q2 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Ocugen Q2 2024 Earnings Summary. Key Business Developments: Ocugen announced significant progress across its gene therapy pipeline. The company completed a successful fundraising round raising $32.6 million net proceeds, extending runway through Q3 2025. Leadership highlighted the recent FDA approval for an expanded access program for OCU400, marking the first-ever gene therapy candidate to treat patients with RP regardless of mutation approved for EAP. Clinical Pipeline Updates: OCU400 (Retinitis Pigmentosa): Phase 3 liMeliGhT trial actively enrolling patients. 60%+ of phase 1/2 intent-to-treat patients met responder criteria. Study powered at >95% assuming 50% response rate. On track for 2026 BLA/MAA approval targets. OCU410 (Geographic Atrophy): Phase 2 ArMaDa trial initiated following phase 1 completion. Nine patients treated across dose cohorts. Preliminary safety and efficacy updates expected later in 2024. OCU410ST (Stargardt Disease): Phase 1/2 GARDian trial near completion of phase 1. Financial Snapshot: For Q2 2024, operating expenses totaled $16.6 million (R&D: $8.9M; G&A: $7.7M), down from $24 million in Q2 2023. Cash position stood at $16 million as of June 30, 2024.
